description: AI control of Android/iOS devices. Screenshots, UI tree, AI vision, Flutter, video. 49 tools.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.saranshbamania/mobile-device-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Google API key for AI visual analysis tools. Get a free key at aistudio.google.com/apikey
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Pro license key to unlock all 49 tools (format: MDMCP-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX). Get Pro at rzp.io/rzp/r4ijQsJY
environmentVariables.name: MOBILE_MCP_LICENSE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Custom path to ADB binary. Auto-detected from PATH if not set.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ADB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Device serial number to use when multiple devices are connected. Auto-detected if only one device is connected.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_DEFAULT_DEVICE
